Islan Hetston  

Merchant
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded April 26th, 2014 by wiscookie
Updated April 28th, 2014

Category: EverQuest

Level: 24
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2021-07-29 02:56:43

Goods sold (34):
Binding Solution 1gp 4cp
Bloodstone 5gp 2sp 4cp
Cat's Eye Agate 2gp 9cp
Cazic's Ink Additive 5gp 2sp 4cp
Charta Arcanum Solution 1437pp 4gp 1sp 1cp
Crude Binding Solution 1sp
Dagger 2pp 9sp 9cp
Doctrine of Wizardry 4pp 1gp 9sp 9cp
Elaborate Binding Solution 1gp 4cp
Elementary Binding Solution 1sp
Enchanted Scrolls 52pp 4gp 9sp 9cp
Fine Charta Arcanum Solution 1500pp 4gp 1sp 1cp
Fine Runic Charta Arcanum Solution 1626pp 4gp 1sp 1cp
Intricate Binding Solution 1gp 4cp
Ipsor's Enlightenment III 8pp 3gp 9sp 9cp
Ipsor's Enlightenment IV 16pp 7gp 9sp 9cp
Jasper 7gp 8sp 7cp
Lexicon [container] 10pp 4gp 9sp 9cp
Makeshift Binding Solution 1sp
Modest Binding Solution 1sp
On Languages 1gp 4cp
Ornate Binding Solution 1gp 4cp
Peridot 10pp 4gp 9sp 9cp
Piece of Parchment 1gp 4cp
Quill 1gp 4cp
Refined Binding Solution 1gp 4cp
Rough Charta Arcanum Solution 1374pp 4gp 1sp 1cp
Rune Binding Solution 1gp 4cp
Runic Charta Arcanum Solution 1563pp 4gp 1sp 1cp
Simple Binding Solution 1sp
Staff 4pp 5gp 1sp 4cp
The Wizard's Canon 2pp 9sp 9cp
Throwing Knife 1sp
Wrist Pouch 1gp 4cp

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest

Report a correction

# Jan 14 2011 at 12:01 AM Rating: Excellent
Byren
Guru
2,467 posts
Includes 23 new items:

▲ Page top
Quest: Druid's Walk
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2006 at 9:24 AM Rating: Decent
Gentsia
Scholar
30 posts
Explore the bridge in Kerra Isle.
Explore the druid ring in Tox Forest.
Speak with Canrield Starbourne in Erud's Crossing. Location n994, p1240, p113, near the north part of the top of the crater.

Reward 4pp, 2 gp, 9 sp, 8 cp
You gain experience! Was almost a full yellow at level 19. Very easy quest, no killing required if your faction is ok. My alt was apprehensive.
▲ Page top
